spans.reason: Bakerloo Line: Minor delays due to train cancellations.

DISTRICT LINE: Saturday 4 and Sunday 5 July, no service between Tower Hill and Upminster. There will also be no c2c services at Fenchurch Street and West Ham. A reduced c2c service operates to/from Liverpool Street via Stratford. Replacement buses operate.
DOCKLANDS LIGHT RAILWAY: Saturday 4 and Sunday 5 July, no service between Prince Regent and Beckton. Please use local London Buses services.

HAMMERSMITH & CITY LINE: Saturday 4 and Sunday 5 July, no service on the entire line. There will also be no c2c services at Fenchurch Street and West Ham. A reduced c2c service operates to/from Liverpool Street via Stratford. Replacement buses operate.

LIONESS LINE: Saturday 4 and Sunday 5 July: On Saturday and Sunday a reduced service will run at certain times between Kilburn High Road and Euston. On Saturday, trains departing Watford Junction, between 0630 and 2030, at 30 minutes past each hour, will terminate at Kilburn High Road. Trains departing Euston, between 0715 and 2115, at 15 minutes each hour will start from Kilburn High Road. On Sunday, trains departing Watford Junction, between 1130 and 2030, at 30 minutes past each hour, will terminate at Kilburn High Road. Trains departing Euston, between 1215 and 2115, at 15 minutes each hour will start from Kilburn High Road.
Metropolitan Line: Minor delays between Harrow-on-the-Hill and Baker Street due to a track fault at Wembley Park. GOOD SERVICE on the rest of the line.
Piccadilly Line: Severe delays due to an earlier signal failure at Acton Town. Tickets will be accepted on London Buses and Elizabeth line via any reasonable routes.
Waterloo & City line: service operates 06:00 until 00:30, Monday to Friday only. There is no service on Saturdays, Sundays and on bank/public holidays.
Windrush Line: No service between Surrey Quays and Clapham Junction while we fix a track fault at Peckham Rye. GOOD SERVICE on the rest of the line.
